title: Neon Genesis Evangelions OP and ED 2009 version
display_title: Neon Genesis Evangelions OP and ED 2009 version
wikitext:
[]: Neon Genesis Evangelion´s OP and ED. (2009 version)             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Aug 15, 2010 11:09 am OP: Cruel Angel Thesis 2009 version http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l1DZHCbfWAQ ED: Fly me to the Moon 2009 version http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TrMuGtgNtkw I can´t believe what they did to my favorite anime opening song... It´s HORRIBLE, IMO. But eh, music is a complete subjective matter, so what do you think of the new "Re-Builds"?

[]:             Quote Post by Darkman.exe213 » Sun Aug 15, 2010 11:31 am I actually like the 2009 version of the opening, other than that change they made to the gap after they sing the chorus, as the new one just sounds plain awkward. The voice of the singer also sounds slightly weaker than the original(at least it seems that way to me), but it still sounds alright. I never really cared for the ending or music that's been heavily influenced by American pop, but I do generally like the new version more than the old one. If nothing else, I like the acapella and higher sound quality.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Aug 15, 2010 12:28 pm That video was posted by Alaska Slim 8)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 15, 2010 2:10 pm IMO, whenever Yoko Takahashi sings Fly Me to the Moon, it sounds awful. They should have asked Claire to sing the new version (she IS still singing)... This take on the ED kind of reminds me of what's on VOX, dunno why. This version isn't completely bad but it could be better (having Claire instead of Yoko Takahashi for one thing!). The OP 2009 version I heard last year, and I'm not too crazy about it. It's not completely awful, but Takahashi's rendition for the Evangelion: Decade album sounds a million times better than the 2009 version. At least that version is nice and jazzy, this version of the OP doesn't seem to know what it wants to be, it has too much going on.

[]:             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Tue Aug 17, 2010 6:28 pm Please......give me back Sinatra.......I need him after that Fly Me To The Moon rendition......

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 17, 2010 7:49 pm Here you go!

[]:             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Tue Aug 17, 2010 7:56 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Here you go!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Aug 17, 2010 9:55 pm I like the 2009 Version of Cruel Angel's Thesis. Not crazy about it, but I enjoy listening to it on occasion. 2009 FMTTM... Eh, not so much. Yoko Takahashi singing it hurts . Takahashi singing it is the only thing that really bothers me about the 2009 FMTTM.

[]:             Quote Post by MisatoRitsukoFan » Mon Sep 13, 2010 3:44 pm You do realize that IS Takahashi singing the 2009 Cruel Angel's Thesis correct?
